PostToolUse.description: No-Hardcode-Check — runs on every file write
Context-Sync — triggers Context Agent after token or component changes
WCAG-Check — runs on every component file write
Storybook-Completeness-Check — runs after story files are written

PreToolUse.description: Token-Existence-Check — runs before Component Agent writes a component
Alias-Migration-Check — blocks alias token rename/delete without migration order

pending.description: These hooks are defined but not yet active. Activate when Storybook and TypeScript are configured.

hooks.name: build-check
hooks.description: TypeScript compiles without errors + all props work after component write

hooks.name: regression-check
hooks.description: All existing stories still pass after a component is modified
